content: I will update the `walkthrough.md` to summarize all the changes made so far, including the separation of the general pujas list from the store screen.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Walkthrough documenting the fix for separating the Pujas lists and the Store Products screen, creating a dedicated all_general_pujas.tsx page, and mapping the View All button appropriately."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough - Puja Page & Shop Products Fix

I resolved all issues regarding product/puja data queries and navigation:
1. Fixed the main Puja screen in the tab bar (`puja.tsx`) to show actual general pujas (`general_poojas` table) instead of store items.
2. Restored the "My Shop Product" screen (`all_pujas.tsx`) to show the correct store items/products (`website_pooja_products` table) rather than general pujas.
3. Created a new, dedicated screen `all_general_pujas.tsx` to list all general pujas from the `general_poojas` table.
4. Redirected the "View All Pujas" button on the Puja page (`puja.tsx`) to navigate to `/all_general_pujas` instead of the store products page.

## Changes Made

### Mobile App Screens

#### [puja.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/(tabs)/puja.tsx)
- Redirected `loadGeneralPoojas` database fetch to query the `general_poojas` table.
- Subscribed `generalSubscription` to realtime database events on `general_poojas`.
- Modified "View All Pujas" button to navigate to `/all_general_pujas` instead of `/all_pujas`.

#### [all_general_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_general_pujas.tsx) [NEW]
- Created this screen to display all general pujas, querying `general_poojas` and filtering them by categories (`'Wealth'`, `'Peace'`, `'Mahadev'`, `'Protection'`, `'Auspicious'`).

#### [all_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_pujas.tsx)
- Kept/restored this page querying the `website_pooja_products` table so that the Shop screen correctly lists store products (e.g. Rudrakshas, Bracelets, etc.).

#### [puja_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/puja_detail.tsx)
- Added `general_poojas` to the fallback list under `loadPujaDetails` so it can resolve and render details for both general pujas and store products.

#### [settings_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/settings_detail.tsx)
- Modified `fetchTempleCatalog` to fetch from both t
<truncated 339 bytes>
